profile.name: Zhen Ding Technology Holding Limited
profile.name_tw: 臻鼎科技控股股份有限公司
profile.description: Zhen Ding Technology is a leading IC substrate manufacturer based in Taiwan, specializing in ABF (Ajinomoto Build-up Film) substrates used in advanced semiconductor packaging. The company is a key supplier for high-performance computing and AI chip packaging.

strengths: Strong position in advanced semiconductor packaging supply chain
Key supplier for HPC and AI chip applications
opportunities: Growing ABF substrate demand driven by AI/HPC
threats: Competition from other ABF substrate manufacturers
